case_title: ATLANTIC CREDIT & FINANCE VS. THOMAS F LOPEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2008 CONTINUED TO FEB-18-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-17-2008 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
